projections.comparison: canonical multiset per channel (the public collections carry no order contract; observed order stays recorded in the raw observation)

excludedFields.rationale: the interpreter exposes rendered form only
no interpreter cause transport — never rendered as "no cause"
report-all granularity exposes no delta subset
not exposed on the interpreter's compute surface
the interpreter's public read surface has no absent-vs-empty distinction (IG72)

projections.comparison: sorted projected-string multisets; the interpreter's report-all cleared entries are restricted to input-filled cells before comparing

rules: every portable policy rejects a development-mode or dirty-source packet before semantic comparison
an unavailable required field/channel fails the policy CLOSED
characterization may retain runner failures and disagreements and can never promote a corpus case
kernel-route confirmation claims ONLY exact cross-route agreement on the pinned projection — one kernel implementation, never independent engines
interpreter agreement is reported under the confirmed policy and required under the conformance policy
